Notice Of Pltf'S Motion To Strike Prayer For Attorney'S Fees In Deft'S Answer To Complaint
Off Calendar Nov-29-2004 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
RULING:
NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: PLAINTIFF PRANA EIGHT PROPERTIES, LLC'S Motion To Strike Prayer For Attorney's Fees In Defendant's Answer To Complaint: GRANTED; no opposition filed. Prevailing party is to prepare an order pursuant to CCP 437c(g). (301/AJR) Reporter: Joyce Long CSR #8620
